title: Automated Sample Plating Protocol for 96-Well Plates
author: Opentrons
materials: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: This protocol automates sample plating from...
steps.instruction: This protocol automates sample plating from collection tubes to a 96-well plate. After sample plating (Station A), the plate containing samples can be used on Station B for RNA extraction as outlined in our [article on automating Covid-19 testing](https://blog.opentrons.com/how-to-use-opentrons-to-test-for-covid-19/). Using a [Single-Channel Pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette), this protocol will transfer the user-specified volume from sample tubes placed in the [Opentrons Tube Rack](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/verified-labware/products/tube-rack-set-1) into a 96-well plate. Users can specify which pipette, the type of source tube, the type of destination plate, the number of samples to transfer, and the volume of each sample being transferred. If you have any questions about this protocol, please email our Applications Engineering team at [protocols@opentrons.com](mailto:protocols@opentrons.com). --- To purchase tips, reagents, or pipettes, please visit our [online store](https://shop.opentrons.com/) or contact our sales team at [info@opentrons.com](mailto:info@opentrons.com) * [Opentrons OT-2](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-robot/products/ot-2) * [Opentrons OT-2 Run App (Version 3.19.0 or later)](https://opentrons.com/ot-app/) * [Opentrons Single-Channel Pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons Filter Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips) * [Opentrons 4-in-1 Tube Rack Set](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/verified-labware/products/tube-rack-set-1) * 96-Well Plate * Sample Tubes --- The [Opentrons tiprack](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips) should be placed in slot 3 and the 96-well plate should be placed in slot 2.
